COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-14-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause was assigned to Dept. 218 from Dept. 206 for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: R. Edwards, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Frear S. Schmid, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff: Davies Wu, present on behalf of Pacific Coast. Defendant not present.
The Court, having read papers submitted, rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: John M. Wildman, individually and as Trustee of the Dupon-Kalorama Revocable Trust as follows:
Principal $14,196.45
Interest $13,131.71
Punitive Damages $75,000.00
Attorney's Fees $286.30
for a total of $102,614.46
Judgment signed in open court.

Off Calendar Apr-15-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Frear S. Schmid, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Pacific Independent Brokerage, Inc. Court notes for the record that default was against Wilerman on October 23, 2003. Davies Wu, President of Pacific Independent Brokerage, Inc. was sworn and examined on behalf of the plaintiff. The Court receives evidence and takes the matter under submission for decision.
